name: payment_api_excellent
content:
# Payment API Specification

## 1. Overview
RESTful payment processing API compliant with PCI-DSS v4.0.

## 2. Authentication
OAuth 2.0 with PKCE flow. All tokens expire after 15 minutes.

## 3. Endpoints
- POST /v1/payments — Initiate payment
- GET /v1/payments/{id} — Get payment status
- POST /v1/refunds — Process refund

## 4. Security
- TLS 1.3 required
- AES-256-GCM encryption at rest
- Rate limit: 100 req/min per API key

## 5. Error Handling
Standard RFC 7807 problem details format.

## 6. Scalability
Horizontal scaling via stateless design. Target: 10k TPS.

## 7. Monitoring
Prometheus metrics exported on /metrics. Alert on p99 > 500ms.

name: moderate_srs
content:
# Software Requirements Specification

## Purpose
User management microservice for internal tooling.

## Features
- CRUD operations for users
- Role-based access control
- Audit trail for changes

## Non-functional
- Response time < 200ms p95
- 99.9% uptime SLA
